arts.ttl: Arne Slot credits Liverpool’s sporting director for emergence of Bournemouth
arts.sum: Richard Hughes switched from Cherries last summer ‘It’s no surprise to me that they are able to compete’ Arne Slot has credited Liverpool’s sporting director, Richard Hughes, with turning Bournemouth into one of the toughest assignments in the Premier League. Hughes joined Liverpool last summer from Bournemouth, where he had been technical director during the club’s rise from the Championship and led the appointment of Andoni Iraola as manager. The former Bournemouth and Portsmouth midfielder was also responsible for players such as Justin Kluivert to the Vitality Stadium. He was appointed Liverpool’s sporting director by Michael Edwards, a friend from their time together at Fratton Park. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Bournemouth vs. Liverpool: Why Andoni Iraola could be Arne Slot's biggest test in Premier League title race
arts.sum: Liverpool's match against Bournemouth in the Premier League on Saturday afternoon is arguably their toughest remaining away fixture, and a victory would be significant.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer update: Can Arne Slot win Premier League title race without signings in the January window?
arts.sum: Liverpool are happy to not spend anything in the January transfer window as they arguably have the best squad in Europe and are set to compete on multiple fronts.

arts.sum: The 39-year-old has been appointed the Toffees' new set piece coach, while Alan Irvine has reunited with the former Manchester United boss for his third stint as Moyes' assistant manager.

arts.ttl: Jordan Henderson now expected to STAY at Ajax until the end of season - as ill-feeling towards former Liverpool captain reaches peak in Netherlands
arts.sum: Jordan Henderson is expected to stay at Ajax until the end of the season, unless Monaco come back with an extraordinary bid for the midfielder this month.
